title: UAF Vulnerability in TrustedSpace Due To Turboshaft's Optimization of TrustedPointers in WebAssembly
description_snippet:
## Details

The root cause of the vulnerability lies in an optimization in WebAssembly by Turboshaft's `LoadStoreSimplificationReducer`. Commit `a2de10e947d76825a26b363235cf4b5c159305ed` introduced a new optimization: `V<Object> REDUCE(LoadTrustedPointer)` will transform `LoadTrustedPointer` operati
